# Geotecnia1 — Rio de Janeiro

> Geotechnical engineering services in Rio de Janeiro, Brasil.

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Rio de Janeiro, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
